Interrupt Polarity

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x3c
Size:
0x4
Source:
gpio_rf.rdl

Description

Selects active polarity for each Port A interrupt source. For level interrupts: 0=active-low, 1=active-high. For edge interrupts: 0=falling-edge, 1=rising-edge.

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:0] intpol rw 0x0 INTPOL

Field Descriptions

intpol - INTPOL

0=active-low/falling, 1=active-high/rising
